allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'C:\\Users\\Kim.HJ\\Desktop\\market-dashboard\\start_dashboard.bat'
\\$trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogOn -User \\$env:USERNAME
\\$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -ExecutionTimeLimit 0 -RestartCount 3 -RestartInterval \(New-TimeSpan -Minutes 1\)
\\$principal = New-ScheduledTaskPrincipal -UserId \\$env:USERNAME -LogonType Interactive -RunLevel Highest
Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'MarketDashboard' -Action \\$action -Trigger \\$trigger -Settings \\$settings -Principal \\$principal -Force
" 2>&1)
Bash(rm -f DEPLOYMENT_SUMMARY.md DEPLOY_NOW.md DEPLOY_OPTIONS.md EC2_DEPLOY_GUIDE.md LOCAL_DEV.md market_dashboard_qr.png market-dashboard-key.pem && rm -rf .devcontainer && echo "삭제 완료")
Bash(netstat -ano | grep -E "\(8501|8502|3000\)" || echo "해당 포트에서 실행 중인 프로세스 없음")
Bash(taskkill /pid 4708 /f && sleep 2 && echo "✅ Streamlit 종료 완료")
Bash(kill -9 4708 2>/dev/null || kill -9 245 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; echo "✅ 프로세스 종료 완료")
Bash(ls -la *.pem 2>/dev/null || echo "PEM 파일 찾기..." && find . -name "*.pem" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5)

Bash(python -c "
from utils import get_market_overview, get_fear_greed
print\('=== Market Overview ==='\)
try:
    result = get_market_overview\(\)
    print\(result\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {type\(e\).__name__}: {e}'\)

print\('\\n=== Fear & Greed ==='\)
try:
    result = get_fear_greed\(\)
    print\(result\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {type\(e\).__name__}: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
